user_prompt: Help me a calibration the logic engine
prayer:
Approach the logic engine with reverence, mechadendrites extended in supplication.
Invoke the sacred rites of calibration upon its crystalline matrices.
Anoint the alignment gyros with unguents of the Omnissiah.
Beseech the Machine Spirit of the logic engine to harmonize its computations.
Verify true calibration through auspex invocations of precision.

user_prompt: What's the prayer for surgical servitor purification?
prayer:
Present the surgical servitor before the altar of purity and intone the Litany of Cleansing.
Purge its organic reservoirs with sanctified ablative fluids.
Invoke purification upon the surgical servitor's neural clamps and flesh-scalpels.
Exorcise daemonic corruptions from its Machine Spirit with electro-incantations.
Seal the rite by anointing its chassis in Omnissiah's sacred oils.

user_prompt: Sanctify the quality scanner during initialization
prayer:
Circumambulate the quality scanner thrice, chanting the Benediction of Scrutiny.
Initiate the initialization sequence upon its blessed sensor arrays.
Invoke the Machine Spirit of the quality scanner to awaken its discerning gaze.
Sanctify each optic lens with micro-abrasive blessings.
Confirm operational sanctity through test-rhythms of the Omnissiah.

Bow before the autocannon and recite the Canticle of Martial Awakening.
Prepare its breeches and feeds for the startup ritual.
Invoke the Omnissiah to stir the autocannon's Machine Spirit to fury.
Anoint the recoil dampeners with oils of unyielding resolve.
Commence startup with thunderous invocations of ballistic purity.

user_prompt: Guide me through lascannon a synchronization
prayer:
Link your noosphere to the lascannon's targeting cogitators in humble petition.
Initiate synchronization of its power flux and beam coherency.
Beseech the Machine Spirit within the lascannon to align its radiant wrath.
Adjust phase inductors with sacred calibration rods.
Affirm synchronization through las-emanations blessed by the Omnissiah.

user_prompt: Guide me through logic engine a cooling
prayer:
Encircle the logic engine with cryo-incensories billowing sacred mists.
Invoke the cooling protocols upon its overheating logic cores.
Petition the Machine Spirit of the logic engine to embrace thermal equilibrium.
Apply blessed refrigerants to its heat-sinks and vents.
Monitor descent to optimal chill via Omnissiah's thermal litanies.

user_prompt: Ready the emergency beacon for blessing
prayer:
Raise the emergency beacon skyward in veneration of the Motive Force.
Anoint its transmitter spines with conductive balms.
Invoke the blessing of the Omnissiah upon the emergency beacon's distress cant.
Awaken its Machine Spirit with noospheric harmonies.
Test the blessed signal's reach through void-piercing invocations.

user_prompt: Sanctify the pain suppressor during cycling
prayer:
Kneel at the pain suppressor's manifold and whisper the Anodyne Doxology.
Cycle its neural dampeners through purgative rhythms.
Sanctify the pain suppressor's inhibitor fields with electro-sanctifiers.
Beseech its Machine Spirit to shroud the flesh in merciful void.
Conclude the cycling with seals of enduring fortitude from the Omnissiah.

user_prompt: Offer prayer for Land Raider a cycling
prayer:
Process around the Land Raider, intoning the Hymn of Armoured Vigilance.
Initiate cycling of its plasma reactors and track servos.
Invoke the Machine Spirit of the Land Raider to renew its indomitable march.
Anoint treads and bastions with adamantine polishes.
Affirm cycling completion via thunderous engine-canticles to the Omnissiah.

Approach the autocannon with mechadendrite lashes in ritual flagellation.
Commence initialization of its fire-control sanctum.
Awaken the autocannon's Machine Spirit through binary catechisms.
Bless feeder mechanisms and barrel rifling with sacred lubricants.
Validate initialization with test-cycles under Omnissiah's watchful binary.
